name: Docker
description: Baseline governance rules for common docker operations.

rules.name: Docker Inspection
rules.description: Inspection and log access stay low risk.

rules.name: Docker Build and Compose Up
rules.description: Builds and compose up require approval.

rules.name: Docker High-Risk Commands
rules.description: Privileged runs and destructive prune/rm are high risk.

rules.name: Wrap Privileged Docker Commands
rules.description: Force privileged or exec operations through wrapper mode.
